## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff of client accounts (SID, Homebase, InnerWell) from Bisera to Matthew, with updates and strategy discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SID: Most complex account, requires attention to detail in publishing and linking. Strategy shifts frequently.](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Homebase: Easiest account currently, but slow with feedback. Focus on glossaries, TLDRs, and "How to Start a Business" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [InnerWell: Strategy in flux, currently publishing 2 articles/week. Potential for increased output and programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Overall: Emphasis on improving communication, proactivity, and demonstrating value to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### SID Account Overview

  - [15 pieces of content weekly: 5 editorials, 5 glossary pages, 5 tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Two editorial pipelines: technical and approachable tone](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Tool pages require careful backend setup in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Strategy shifts frequently; create monthly plans instead of quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Current focus: repositioning as best solution for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

### Homebase Account Status

  - [15 glossary pages, 5 TLDRs, and 5 "How to Start a Business" pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Glossary pages are straightforward; pipeline works well](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [TLDRs and "How to Start a Business" pages need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Slow client feedback, but generally easy to manage](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Potential for keyword research to find more glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

### InnerWell Strategy and Challenges

  - [Currently publishing 2 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Recently completed 300 city-level ketamine pages](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Strategy shift away from condition-focused content to treatment-focused](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Technical issues with website (sitemap, indexing) affecting SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Relationship improving with new stakeholder, more open to long-term planning](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

### Pipeline and Publishing Updates

  - [Discussion on moving SID publishing to Suleiman](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Homebase using Daniel for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [InnerWell using a freelancer familiar with Prismic CMS](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Potential for implementing agentic pipelines across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

### Client Communication and Expectations

  - [Need for more proactive communication, especially with Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Importance of demonstrating value and process improvements to clients](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Balancing client requests with strategic recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to review Loom video from Bisera on SID's FAQ and key takeaway pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Update prompts for InnerWell's scrunch (Jakub to handle)](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Introduce Jakub as account director for Tavern in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Continue strategy reset for InnerWell](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Focus on completing Homebase deliverables (TLDRs, "How to Start a Business" pages)](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Improve backend setup and checking for SID's tool pages in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Consider implementing agentic pipelines for increased efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/BAyFyVewzbxceJfgjixstbxsfedgJ3fS?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
